creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/#prior-unsupported>: 

> …  the Unsupported Releases section of the FreeBSD Security Information page. …

<https://www.freebsd.org/security/unsupported/> is not a section, it's a separate page. 

With 13.0 reaching end of life (expected in two days), take an opportunity to correct this section of /releases/ (and any other part of the page that's obviously wrong).
